Today’s “briefing” was not that. No more games. She still has to come before our committee.

posts.text:
.@OversightDems and I just walked out of a fake briefing where AG Pam Bondi refused to say she would follow our subpoena and testify to our Committee under oath. 

She must follow the law. And we won’t participate in these games. It’s time for Bondi to testify under oath.

posts.text:
Oversight Democrats just walked out of an outrageous fake hearing where Pam Bondi refused to say she would show up for her under oath deposition.

We asked her multiple times and she refused to commit. We won’t participate in a fake hearing that’s not under oath and not transcribed. The American people deserve transparency and the truth. We are going to end this White House Cover-Up.
